_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "patch: test.txt" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the agent text "I'll patch the file: test.txt" to appear. A completed tool call (an element with data-testid "tool-call-completed") should become visible, and the text "patch" should be visible on the page.
